title: Finding and applying for scholarships
content:
## Finding and applying for scholarships , Te rapu me te tono mō ngā karahipi
Find out where to look for scholarships and how to apply.
- Featured guide How to find scholarships Me pēhea te rapu karahipi A scholarship is money given to students to help them pay for tertiary study. Find out what you could apply for and put yourself forward – you could get hundreds or even thousands of dollars.

## How to find scholarships

## Me pēhea te rapu karahipi
A scholarship is money given to students to help them pay for tertiary study. Find out what you could apply for and put yourself forward – you could get hundreds or even thousands of dollars.
- Guide How to apply for scholarships Me pēhea te tono mō te karahipi Found a scholarship you might qualify for? Ka pai! Now give yourself the best chance of success by following these steps to apply.

## How to apply for scholarships

## Me pēhea te tono mō te karahipi
Found a scholarship you might qualify for? Ka pai! Now give yourself the best chance of success by following these steps to apply.
- Guide Scholarships for Māori students Ngā karahipi mā ngā ākonga Māori If your whakapapa is Māori, find out what scholarships you could apply for and put yourself forward – you could get hundreds or even thousands of dollars towards tertiary study costs.

## Scholarships for Māori students

## Ngā karahipi mā ngā ākonga Māori
If your whakapapa is Māori, find out what scholarships you could apply for and put yourself forward – you could get hundreds or even thousands of dollars towards tertiary study costs.
- Guide Scholarships for Pacific students Ngā karahipi mā ngā ākonga Moananui-a-Kiwa If you're of Pacific Island descent, find out what scholarships you could apply for and put yourself forward – you could get hundreds or even thousands of dollars towards tertiary study costs.

## Scholarships for Pacific students

## Ngā karahipi mā ngā ākonga Moananui-a-Kiwa
If you're of Pacific Island descent, find out what scholarships you could apply for and put yourself forward – you could get hundreds or even thousands of dollars towards tertiary study costs.
